name: Diriteks Dirilis Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Diriteks Dirilis Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells mink type blankets and non-slip carpets. It also offers acrylic yarn for use in the production of blankets and carpets. The company sells its products through dealers in Turkey and through distributors internationally. Diriteks Dirilis Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Isparta, Turkey.
